case_title: ELOISE M BATES VS. STEPHEN J BATES

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ISSUED
$200.00 PD BY: STEPHEN J. BATES
CONTINUED FR 1/23/01 TO PER C. EMLEY, CALENDAR MOTION: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING SET FOR APR-04-2001 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 403
RESPONSIVE DECLARATION TO OSC OR NTC OF MOTION- RESPONDENT 5/4/01, 9:00AM, 403
(403/CWW) CHRIS EMLEY APPEARED TO REQUEST A STIPULATED CONTINUANCE. CONT. TO 6/27/01 AT 1:30P FOR 1-2 HR HRG. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED.

CHRISTOPHER EMLEY WITH PETITIONER. JAYNE KELLY DE LOPEZ WITH RESPONDENT. BARRY SCHNEIDER & PEGGY BENNINGTON SERVED AS PRO TEM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE JUDGES. PARTIES RETURNED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH AN AGREEMENT, WHICH WAS READ INTO THE RECORD BY MS. DE LOPEZ. EACH PARTY WAS VOIRED DIRED BY THEIR RESPECTIVE ATTORNEYS AS TO THE TERMS AND THEIR UNDERSTANDING OF THE AGREEMENT. PETITIONER WAS ALSO VOIR DIRED AS TO THE JURISDICTIONAL FACTS FOR JUDGMENT OF DISSOLUTION. GOOD CAUSE APPEARING, THE COURT ACCEPTED THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT AS THE ORDER OF THE COURT. THE COURT ALSO ENTERED A JUDGMENT OF MARITAL DISSOLUTION. MARITAL STATUS IS TERMINATED AS OF TODAY'S DATE. COUNSEL FOR PETITIONER SHALL PREPARE THE ORDER & JUDGMENT OF DISSOLUTION. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY MARY ELLEN SCHERER, CSR #5208.
